strategy: Enter on time. A late join buffs all three brothers with Aegis shields, heals, and Guiding Lights.
Attack with Fire; Taffy takes +10% and resists Ice 35%. He and his brothers are stunable and beguilable, so stuns can buy tempo.
Do not lean on traps. Taffy Cleanse-Wards a trap off whichever brother you trapped, so Indemnity a key trap if you must use one.
Do not rely on single blades. Ricky Steal-Charms the blade off whoever you bladed, so Aegis the blade, Steal Charm it back, or use Supercharge, which does not trigger it.
Do not use DoTs at all. Tiki removes any DoT in the duel, pet DoTs included. Stack Aegis-protected blades, then AoE all three together since they buff each other.
cheatNotes: Joining late puts an Aegis Tower Shield (-55%) on Ricky and Tiki and an Aegis Frozen Armor (185) on Taffy. Enter at the start.
Placing a Trap on any brother makes Taffy Cleanse-Ward one trap off that target.
Indemnity on a trap prevents that removal.
Spells that leave traps behind, like Fire from Above, also trigger this cheat.
Mass Feint (+75%) makes Taffy remove only the trap on the caster, not the traps on the bosses.
Spells like Windstorm do not trigger this cheat.
Joining late makes Ricky triple-cast Healing Current on himself for 100, then 400, then 1,000 health.
Casting a Blade makes Ricky Steal-Charm it off the wizard who received it. Aegis, Steal Charm it back, or use Supercharge instead.
Quench can dispel this Steal Charm cheat.
Aegis on the blade prevents the steal.
On a tri-blade, only the last part is stolen (Fire on Elemental blades, Life on Spirit blades).
On a multi-target blade like Bladestorm, only the casting wizard is affected.
You can Steal Charm the blade back without penalty.
Supercharge does not trigger the Steal Charm cheat.
Joining late makes Tiki cast Guiding Light on himself and Ricky and an Aegis Spirit Armor on Taffy.
Any DoT cast on anyone in the duel is removed by Tiki. Do not use damage-over-time.
Pet spells trigger Tiki's DoT removal too.
